query:
SELECT 
  c.id, 
  c.name, 
  c.description,
  COUNT(m.user_id) as member_count,
  GROUP_CONCAT(m.user_id) as member_ids
FROM team_chat_channels c
LEFT JOIN team_chat_members m ON m.channel_id = c.id
GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.description;
